The Problem

Cross-border payments are broken for growing businesses

Slow Processing Times
International transfers take 3-5 business days, delaying critical business operations
Impact: 40% revenue impact
Hidden Fees
Complex fee structures eat into margins with exchange rates and transfer fees
Impact: 8% lost to fees
Compliance Complexity
Navigating regulations across 200+ countries requires dedicated resources
Impact: 25 hrs/week lost
Limited Reach
Traditional banks can't support emerging markets where opportunities exist
Impact: 60% markets unreachable
Payoneer
